title: Effector
description: Base ascription schema for Effector Ascriptions. An Effector is an output port of a Mechanism, derived by the definition-manager from the Mechanism rule's AST. It references the owning Mechanism and the Archetype that types the emitted data. Tenant-defined archetypes MUST NOT extend Effector.

mechanism.description: ID reference to the owning Mechanism.

archetype.description: ID reference to the Archetype that types the Effector's output payload.

interface.description: Optional ID reference to the Interface that exposes this Effector for inter-Structure coupling. Null means the port is private to the Structure.
